args: set -eu; if [ -n "${PATH:-}" ]; then PATH="$PATH:/bin:/usr/bin:/run/current-system/sw/bin"; else PATH="/bin:/usr/bin:/run/current-system/sw/bin"; fi; export PATH; bash_bin=; for candidate_bash in /run/current-system/sw/bin/bash /bin/bash /usr/bin/bash; do if [ -x "$candidate_bash" ]; then bash_bin="$candidate_bash"; break; fi; done; if [ -z "$bash_bin" ]; then echo "tiber.mcp_bash_missing" >&2; exit 127; fi; if [ -n "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}" ]; then if [ -x "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/bin/tiber" ]; then exec "$bash_bin" "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/bin/tiber" mcp stdio; fi; echo "tiber.mcp_claude_plugin_root_invalid" >&2; exit 127; fi; if [ -n "${CODEX_HOME:-}" ]; then candidate="$CODEX_HOME/plugins/cache/ai-plugins/tiber/0.10.0/bin/tiber"; if [ -x "$candidate" ]; then exec "$bash_bin" "$candidate" mcp stdio; fi; echo "tiber.mcp_codex_cache_missing" >&2; exit 127; fi; if [ -n "${HOME:-}" ]; then candidate="$HOME/.codex/plugins/cache/ai-plugins/tiber/0.10.0/bin/tiber"; if [ -x "$candidate" ]; then exec "$bash_bin" "$candidate" mcp stdio; fi; fi; echo "tiber.mcp_launcher_missing" >&2; exit 127
tiber.description: Tiber stdio MCP server for Git-backed task board reads and writes.
